ValidationRule.description: The Expense Card can not be changed anymore.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( ISPICKVAL( Package__r.PackageStatus__c , "Closed"), AND( Package__r.ValHasPackage__c =true, ISPICKVAL( Package__r.PackageSuperior__r.PackageStatus__c,"Closed") ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to create or change the Expense Card since the Package or Parent Package is closed. Please contact the Project Manager for assistance. (EC001)
